name: Sprint Execute
description: Orchestrate a complete sprint end-to-end: story writing, development, QA/testing, and defect fixing per story, then sprint-level retrospective, adversarial review, and red team. All issues resolved before sprint closes.

name: Epic Execute
description: Orchestrate a complete epic end-to-end: run sprints for all stories then epic-level retrospective, adversarial review, red team, architectural drift analysis, and functional completeness review. All Critical/High issues resolved before epic closes.

name: Red Team Review
description: Red team security and resilience review from four adversarial perspectives: external attacker, malicious insider, chaos engineer, and abusive legitimate user. Use when reviewing implementations, APIs, or architecture.
